I'm trying to secure my account but they say I must reset my password and enter the 2FA code sent to my phone at [link removed] to verify it's really me before I can release funds.","category":"Fraud","correctAction":"Remove","difficulty":"Easy","explanation":"This is a classic credential-harvesting attempt asking for sensitive security details like passwords and 2FA codes under the guise of verification, which requires immediate removal.","day":6,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"correctSpecialistReason":"","acceptableSpecialistReasons":[],"accountAgeDays":24,"followerCount":131,"followingCount":371,"verifiedStatus":false,"postCount":261,"bio":"Account help, listings and payment updates.","previousFlags":5,"location":"Greyford","platform":"EchoBoard","isStoryPost":false}]}
